entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where the discussed biotic constraints and food security issues are prevalent

entities.name: NORTH AFRICA
entities.description: Region where grass weeds of wheat and white fly vectors are problematic

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where stem borers and post-harvest grain weevils are problematic

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: Cereal crop affected by grass weeds like Bromus and Lolium in North Africa

entities.name: VEGETABLE CROPS
entities.description: Crops affected by the tomato leaf curl virus complex

entities.name: GRAINS
entities.description: Crops affected by post-harvest weevils and mycotoxins

entities.name: BIOTIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Biological factors such as pests, weeds, and diseases that limit agricultural productivity

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Stresses caused by living organisms that affect crop health and yield

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that can exacerbate biotic problems

entities.name: PEST PROBLEMS
entities.description: Issues caused by harmful insects or other pests

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions affecting crops

entities.name: MYCOTOXINS
entities.description: Toxic compounds produced by fungi that contaminate stored grains

entities.name: FUMONISINS
entities.description: Specific types of mycotoxins found in stored grains

entities.name: AFLATOXINS
entities.description: Specific types of mycotoxins found in stored grains

entities.name: STRIGA
entities.description: A parasitic weed found throughout Africa

entities.name: OROBANCHE
entities.description: A parasitic weed found throughout Africa

entities.name: BROMUS
entities.description: A grass weed affecting wheat in North Africa

entities.name: LOLIUM
entities.description: A grass weed affecting wheat in North Africa

entities.name: STEM BORERS
entities.description: Insects that act as biotic constraints in sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: GRAIN WEEVILS
entities.description: Post-harvest insects that affect stored grains in sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: BEMISIA TABACI
entities.description: White fly that acts as a vector for the tomato leaf curl virus complex

entities.name: TOMATO LEAF CURL VIRUS COMPLEX
entities.description: A viral complex affecting vegetable crops in North Africa

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional method of developing crop varieties to resist pests and diseases

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Novel technological solutions used to address intractable biotic and abiotic constraints

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used to control biotic constraints

entities.name: HERBICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used to control weeds

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural management techniques used to alleviate crop problems

entities.name: SEED BASED SOLUTIONS
entities.description: Agricultural solutions delivered through improved seed varieties

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Genetic material within the crop genome used for breeding

entities.name: CROP GENOME
entities.description: The complete set of genetic material in a crop

entities.name: PUBLIC SECTOR
entities.description: Governmental or non-profit entities involved in agricultural research

entities.name: PRIVATE SECTOR
entities.description: Commercial entities that supply isolated genes
